prediction_review.visual_assessment: The single prediction spans most of the image width and height and includes sky, terrain, foreground tank, background vehicles, and context. It is not a tight individual-body detection.

large_foreground_reference_target.label: target_1
large_foreground_reference_target.note: Large reference box can make an oversized prediction look numerically better than it looks visually.

decision.rationale: v015e has the strongest prompt-only aggregate hinge signal so far, but case 101 remains a broad-box manual-review failure.
if_dev_later_approved: Treat v015e as learning evidence only, not promotion.
Keep case 101 as a known manual-review failure.
Run dev only to test whether aggregate prompt signal generalizes.
Do not run holdout, all-112, runtime adoption, or promotion without separate approval.
